title: The AI code wars are heating up
summary: GitHub Copilot, Microsoft's 2021 AI coding tool, predated ChatGPT and sparked intensifying competition for AI-assisted development. The article traces how AI coding tools evolved from novelty to a major battleground for tech companies.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the AI coding and vibe-coding booms, follow David Pierce. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
Writing code was a killer app for AI even before anyone was really talking about AI. In the spring of 2021, 18 months before the world knew the word "ChatGPT," Microsoft debuted the very first product of a partnership with a nonprofit called OpenAI: a tool called GitHub Copilot that watched developers as they wrote code and tried to autocomplete snippets and lines for them …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI代码战争升温
zh.summary: GitHub Copilot是微软2021年推出的AI编码工具,比ChatGPT更早出现,引发了人工智能辅助开发领域的激烈竞争。该文章追溯了AI编码工具如何从新奇事物演变为科技公司的主要竞争阵地。

title: Shock from Iran war has Trump's vision for US energy dominance flailing
summary: Despite record US domestic oil and gas production, geopolitical shocks like the Iran conflict continue to drive fuel price spikes, undermining Trump's energy dominance strategy. Global market factors override domestic supply in determining energy prices.
content: Record domestic oil and gas production hasn't saved US drivers from price spikes.

zh.title: 伊朗战争冲击使特朗普的美国能源统治愿景受挫
zh.summary: 尽管美国国内石油和天然气产量创历史新高,但伊朗冲突等地缘政治冲击仍继续推高燃料价格,破坏了特朗普的能源统治战略。全球市场因素在决定能源价格方面压过了国内供应。

title: Allow me to explain why I love this camera that can’t shoot color
summary: The Ricoh GR IV Monochrome scored 8/10 for exceptional black-and-white image quality and portable design, despite lacking zoom and color capabilities. It targets photography enthusiasts who prioritize monochrome aesthetics and always-carry convenience.
content:
No frills, all artsy thrills. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

I love black-and-white photography. I also adore compact cameras you can always have by your side. So I'm a total mark for the Ricoh GR IV Monochrome, a fixed-lens camera that can't zoom and can't record color - at all. It's a formula that makes the average person ask, "Why?" 
I've tested the GR IV Monochrome for over a month, taking it with me everywhere and photographing everything. Let me explain how this pricey little point-and-shoot is likely to go down as one of my all-time-favorite cameras.
Ricoh GR IV Monochrome


Score: 8

ProsCons


Excellent black-and-white image quality
Everything great about the standard GR IV: sharp lens, small size, …



Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 让我解释为什么我喜欢这款不能拍彩色的相机
zh.summary: 理光GR IV单色版获得8分(满分10分),凭借出色的黑白成像质量和便携设计脱颖而出,尽管缺乏变焦和彩色功能。它针对的是那些优先考虑单色美学和随身携带便利的摄影爱好者。

title: Walmart-owned Flipkart, Amazon are squeezing India’s quick commerce startups
summary: Walmart-owned Flipkart and Amazon are intensifying competition in India's quick commerce market through aggressive expansion into smaller cities and heavy discounting. The strategy is putting significant pressure on smaller quick commerce startups that lack the scale and capital to compete with these giants. The moves highlight how major e-commerce players are leveraging their resources to dominate the fast-growing quick delivery segment.
content: Flipkart's ongoing expansion beyond major cities and heavy discounting is raising risks for India's quick commerce startups, analysts say.

zh.title: 沃尔玛旗下Flipkart和亚马逊正在挤压印度快速电商初创企业
zh.summary: 沃尔玛旗下的Flipkart和亚马逊正在通过积极向较小城市扩张和大幅降价来加剧印度快速电商市场的竞争。这一战略对缺乏规模和资本与这些巨头竞争的较小快速电商初创企业造成了巨大压力。这些举措突显了主要电商平台如何利用其资源来主导这一快速增长的快速配送市场。
